title: potentilla glandulosa f. monticola
intro: Potentilla glandulosa f. monticola, also known as the mountain cinquefoil, is a perennial plant species within the Rosaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The mountain cinquefoil is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Potentilla glandulosa f. monticola can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
